title: Blue Cheese Dutch Casserole
description: A rich and savory casserole with a tangy blue cheese twist. Perfect for a cozy dinner.

ingredients.name: ground beef
ingredients.notes: 80/20 lean to fat ratio works well

instructions: Cook ground beef in a large skillet over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks, until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add diced onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in paprika, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Transfer the beef mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Sprinkle shredded melted cheese over the top of the beef mixture.
Sprinkle crumbly blue cheese crumbles over the top of the melted cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
